mapper.sql: SELECT 'ingd' AS "dataType", LEAST( NULLIF(STRPOS(UPPER(INGD.rep_name), UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0), NULLIF(STRPOS(UPPER(INGD.rep_name_en), UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0) ) AS matchPos, INGD.id AS "data1", INGD.rep_name AS "data2", INGD.rep_name_en AS "data3", COALESCE(array_to_string(INGD.cas_no, ','), '') AS "data4", COALESCE(array_to_string(INGD.ec_no, ','), '') AS "data5", COALESCE(array_to_string(INGD.names_ko, ','), '') AS "data6", COALESCE(array_to_string(INGD.names_en, ','), '') AS "data7", INGD.kcai_id AS "data8" FROM T_INGD_DIC INGD

sql.if:
AND ( UPPER(INGD.rep_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') OR UPPER(INGD.rep_name_en) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM unnest(INGD.cas_no) AS cas WHERE UPPER(cas) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM unnest(INGD.ec_no) AS ec WHERE UPPER(ec) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') )
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM unnest(INGD.names_ko) AS nko WHERE UPPER(nko) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') )
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM unnest(INGD.names_en) AS nen WHERE UPPER(nen) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') )
)

mapper.sql: SELECT 'raw' AS "dataType", LEAST( NULLIF(STRPOS(UPPER(ER.raw_name), UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0), NULLIF(STRPOS(UPPER(ER.supplier), UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0), NULLIF(STRPOS(UPPER(ER.ptn_name), UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0), NULLIF(STRPOS(UPPER(ER.prod_company), UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0), NULLIF(STRPOS(UPPER(ER.prod_country_name), UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0) ) AS matchPos, ER.raw_seq AS "data1", ER.raw_name AS "data2", ER.prod_company AS "data3", ER.supplier AS "data4", ER.ptn_name AS "data5", ER.prod_country AS "data6", '' || ER.raw_elem_info_count AS "data7", ER.ptn_seq AS "data8" FROM T_ES_RAW ER

sql.if:
AND ( UPPER(ER.raw_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') OR UPPER(ER.supplier) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') OR UPPER(ER.ptn_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')
OR UPPER(ER.prod_company) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')
OR UPPER(ER.prod_country_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')
)

mapper.sql: SELECT 'hw_brand' AS "dataType", LEAST( NULLIF(STRPOS(UPPER(HB.brand_ko), UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0), NULLIF(STRPOS(UPPER(HB.brand_en), UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0) ) AS matchPos, HB.seq AS "data1", HB.brand_full_name AS "data2", HB.brand_ko AS "data3", HB.brand_en AS "data4", '' AS "data5", '' AS "data6", '' AS "data7", HB.count AS "data8" FROM T_HW_BRAND HB

sql.if: AND ( UPPER(HB.brand_ko) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') OR UPPER(HB.brand_en) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') )

mapper.sql: SELECT 'pt_name' AS "dataType", LEAST( NULLIF(STRPOS(UPPER(PT.ptn_name), UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 0) ) AS matchPos, PT.ptn_seq AS "data1", PT.ptn_name AS "data2", '' AS "data3", '' AS "data4", '' AS "data5", '' AS "data6", '' AS "data7", 0 AS "data8" FROM T_PARTNER_INF PT

AND COALESCE(PT.del_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND ( UPPER(PT.ptn_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') )
mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.search.mapper.SearchDAO.getNationLmitListForIngredient */
SELECT AA.ingd_id , AA.eu , AA.usa , AA.china , AA.japan , AA.korea , TO_CHAR(AA.rgt_dttm, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS rgt_dttm FROM t_ingd_nation_regu_inf AA WHERE AA.ingd_id::text = #{ingdId} ORDER BY ingd_id

/* com.erns.coching.search.mapper.SearchDAO.getNationExpLmitListForIngredient */
SELECT AA.ingd_id , AA.eu , AA.usa , AA.china , AA.japan , AA.korea , AA.un_no , TO_CHAR(AA.rgt_dttm, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS rgt_dttm FROM t_ingd_nation_exp_regu_inf AA WHERE AA.ingd_id::text = #{ingdId} ORDER BY ingd_id;
